---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

## 📬 Contact Information

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-card}
### 📧 Email

**Academic:** volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr

**Website:** volkanisiklab.com
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### 📞 Phone

**Office:** +90 312 311 60 15 - 129

**School:** Vocational School of Social Sciences
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### 📍 Office Address

**Hacettepe University**  
**Vocational School of Social Sciences**  
Beytepe Campus, Ankara, Turkey

[Google Maps](https://maps.google.com/?q=Hacettepe+University+Vocational+School+of+Social+Sciences){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### 🕘 Office Hours

**Advising:** Wednesday 10:00 - 12:00

**Other Visits:** By appointment
:::

:::

---

## 💬 Contact Options

For research collaboration, media inquiries, or general communication, you can use the following channels:

::: {.contact-buttons}

[📧 Send Email](mailto:volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr){.contact-btn .email}

[💬 WhatsApp](https://wa.me/34600900949){.contact-btn .whatsapp}

[🔗 LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/do%C3%A7-dr-volkan-%C4%B1%C5%9F%C4%B1k-79150bbb/){.contact-btn .linkedin}

:::

---

## 🏢 Institution Information

::: {.institution-info}

Hacettepe University  
Vocational School of Social Sciences  
Beytepe Campus  
06800 Beytepe, Ankara, Turkey

:::

---

## 📅 Appointment

I recommend scheduling in advance for one-on-one meetings, collaboration requests, or media inquiries.

**For appointments:** volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr

**WhatsApp:** +90 346 009 00 949

### Send a Message

<form class="contact-form" onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); const name=document.getElementById('contact-name').value.trim(); const email=document.getElementById('contact-email').value.trim(); const subject=document.getElementById('contact-subject').value.trim(); const message=document.getElementById('contact-message').value.trim(); const body = 'Name: ' + encodeURIComponent(name) + '%0AEmail: ' + encodeURIComponent(email) + '%0A%0A' + encodeURIComponent(message); window.location.href='mailto:volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr?subject=' + encodeURIComponent(subject || 'Website Contact Form') + '&body=' + body;">
  <label for="contact-name">Name</label>
  <input id="contact-name" name="name" type="text" placeholder="Your name" required>

  <label for="contact-email">Email</label>
  <input id="contact-email" name="email" type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" required>

  <label for="contact-subject">Subject</label>
  <input id="contact-subject" name="subject" type="text" placeholder="Subject" required>

  <label for="contact-message">Message</label>
  <textarea id="contact-message" name="message" rows="6" placeholder="Write your message here..." required></textarea>

  <button type="submit" class="contact-submit">Open Email Draft</button>
</form>
